query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "gemma 4 technical report" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on multimodal architecture engineering (LLaVA framework, image backbones, connector pretraining) rather than the "linguistics" or specific linguistic properties of the Gemma model that the user's question targets. While it uses Gemma models, it does not measure linguistic mechanisms, analyze linguistic phenomena, or provide a foundational reference for the linguistic extension of Gemma, failing to satisfy criteria (a) through (f) for inclusion in a literature review on this spe
